changes.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: These restrictions apply to all transfers unless the Board and the Requisite Holders approve the transfer in writing before it is effective.
changes.proposed_redline: These restrictions do not apply to a transfer to a Permitted Transferee, provided the recipient signs a joinder agreeing to be bound by this Agreement before the transfer is effective.

changes.exact_quote: Each stockholder must provide any indemnity, escrow, holdback, non-compete covenant, or other seller obligation requested by the buyer as a condition to the drag-along.
changes.proposed_redline: No stockholder will be required to provide uncapped indemnity, non-pro rata liability, or a non-compete covenant as a condition to the drag-along.

changes.exact_quote: Investor consent is required for any action the Investor considers material, whether or not enumerated or separately agreed by Company. A consent request remains open for 3 days, and supporting board materials are circulated 8 days before the vote.
changes.proposed_redline: Investor consent rights are limited to the enumerated protective provisions in this Agreement, and no other investor approval is required unless Company separately agrees in writing.

changes.exact_quote: Investor consent is required for every budget, hire, vendor contract, and ordinary-course product decision.
changes.proposed_redline: Company may conduct ordinary-course operations without investor consent, including budgets, hiring, vendor contracts, product decisions, and routine financing administration.

summary: All eight T2-N response children reviewed against the v4 answer key.
